wordplay_note: One of the three friends investigating VALIS
card_description: Kevin is a character in Philip K. Dick's *VALIS*. Phil and Fat's friend who represents a cynical Catholic perspective. Name note: One of the three friends investigating VALIS. Catholic cynicism as one lens on the divine. First appears in *VALIS*.

reference.brief: Phil and Fat's friend who represents a cynical Catholic perspective
reference.significance: Catholic cynicism as one lens on the divine
